name: Fruit Cornish Hens
recipeIngredient: 100 g Capers (plus a bit of juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean hens well under cold water. Pat dry.
2. In a large bowl, combine hens, garlic, oregano, salt, pepper, vinegar, olive oil, prunes, dried apricots, green olives, capers, bay leaves, and brown sugar. Toss to coat evenly.
3. Preheat oven to 350°F.
4. Arrange game hens in 1 or 2 shallow roasting pans. Spoon the marinade over the hens.
5. Bake for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, basting frequently with pan juices, until golden and cooked through.
6. Transfer hens, fruit, olives, and capers to a serving platter. Drizzle remaining oil and parsley on top.
